description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build TWiLight Menu++ Nightly that triggers on push to all branches except README.md and .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/*, and on pull requests to any branch with the same path exceptions. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a devkitpro/devkitarm:20241104 container that checks out the repository with submodules, installs tools, sets up the environment, downloads manual pages, builds TWiLightMenu++, creates booter and TWiLightMenu CIAs, packs 7z packages for nightly, and uploads build artifacts.
